steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The word
"Unlike" directly introduces a contrast between Wada Eisaku (who adopted European methods) and Hashimoto Gaho. This requires finding the opposite of "adopted" for the blank.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The example explains that Hashimoto used traditional Japanese methods (e.g., pigments on silk), so the blank must mean “used/accepted.”
"Embraced" conveys active acceptance, matching the example.

The other choices either reverse the contrast or are irrelevant.
That is the correct answer.
